name: China Primary Energy Holdings Limited
summary: China Primary Energy Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the transmission and distribution of natural gas in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through three segments: Transmission and Distribution of Natural Gas; Trading of Electronic Components; and Property Investment. It also engages in the development and use of energy technology; operation of heat and power cogeneration plant; and heat generation activities. The company was formerly known as China Primary Resources Holdings Limited. China Primary Energy Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
